sentences.translationEn: The family donated clothes to the poor.

sentences.arabic: جَمَعَتِ الْمَلَابِسَ النَّظِيفَةَ الَّتِي لَمْ تَعُدْ تَسْتَخْدِمُهَا.
sentences.translation: Skupili su čistu odjeću koju više ne koriste.
sentences.translationEn: They collected clean clothes they no longer used.

sentences.translation: Dali su ih dobrotvornoj organizaciji u kvartu.
sentences.translationEn: They gave them to the charity in the neighborhood.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الطِّفْلُ: أَنَا سَعِيدٌ لِأَنَّنَا أَعَنَّا النَّاسَ.
sentences.translation: Dijete je reklo: Sretan sam što smo pomogli ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: The child said: I am happy because we helped people.
